title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.230 - Twenty-second week of year, 22q Awareness Week
text:
9.230.  Twenty-second week of year, 22q Awareness Week. — The twenty-second week of each year is hereby designated as "22q Awareness Week" in the state of Missouri.  The citizens of this state are encouraged to observe the week with appropriate activities and events to increase awareness of individuals with a chromosome 22q11.2 deletion.
(L. 2015 H.B. 778)
